tools.name: resolve_material
tools.description: Resolve a formula or Materials Project id to a Catalyst material id.

parameters.query: string: formula, mp-id, or free-text material mention

tools.name: search_materials
tools.description: Search and filter the local Catalyst materials snapshot.

tools.name: get_material_workspace
tools.description: Load grounded properties, evidence, and graph context for one material.

parameters.material_id: string: local material id, mp-id, or formula

tools.returns: workspace summary, evidence, properties, and graph slice

tools.name: get_neighborhood
tools.description: Load directly connected graph neighbors for one material.

parameters.material_id: string: local material id, mp-id, or formula

tools.name: inspect_edge
tools.description: Inspect one graph edge by id.

tools.name: screen_candidates
tools.description: Rank candidate materials for a natural-language requirement.

tools.name: compare_materials
tools.description: Compare two or more local material ids.

tools.name: select_material
tools.description: Ask the UI to select, highlight, zoom to, and inspect one material.

parameters.material_id: string: local material id, mp-id, or formula

tools.name: export_subgraph
tools.description: Export a grounded subgraph for selected material ids.

tools.name: start_research
tools.description: Start literature/research mode when local data is insufficient.

tools.name: ingest_url
tools.description: Ingest a URL into local research mode when enabled.
